w:r.w:t: ( Registered under societies Registration Act 35 of 2001)
I am here with enclosing a Memorandum and of the Rules and Regulations of

registration under the Societies Registration Act 35 of 2001. I request that this may kindly be registered under the above said act and issue a necessary certificate of Registration to me. The necessary fee for its registration will be paid in person.
: All members I.D Proofs with photos
We the undersigned resolved to form a Society by name
and get it registered under the Societies Registration Act 35 of 2001 and also resolved to authorized the
of the said Association to present the document in the Registrar’s Office, Kurnool and get it registered under the above said Act and receive the necessary certificate.
Pet, Revenue Ward No. 24, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh- 518301
Pet, Revenue Ward No. 24, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh- 518301
Providing food, education, healthcare, and emotional support to orphaned children to help them to lead a better life.
Promoting education, healthcare, and employment opportunities for Poor communities to improve their living conditions.
Conducting skill development programs and create job opportunities for women to help them become self-reliant.
Organizing awareness programs and self-defence training sessions to ensure the safety and security of girls.
Providing free education books and learning materials to children from poor backgrounds.
Offering free medical check-ups, health camps, and awareness programs for children, women, and the elderly.
Providing counselling services and emotional support for orphans, women facing abuse, and elderly people.
Promoting tree plantation drives, waste management programs, and awareness about protecting nature.
Working on projects that provide clean drinking water to remote areas and educate people about water conservation.
Conducting seminars, workshops, and campaigns on child rights, gender equality, and environmental safety.

We the following mentioned persons in memorandum of Society have formed into a society and are responsible to run the affairs of the society and are desirous of getting the same registered under, the Societies Registration Act 35 of 2001.
, District: Kurnool, State: Andhra Pradesh, Pin Code: 518462
H.no. 24/407, Karvanpeta, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh -518301.
H.no. 24/407, Karvanpeta, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh -518301.
H.no. 24/407, Karvanpeta, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh -518301
We the undersigned desirous to form a committee and get it registered under the society’s registration act 35 of 2001.
Signatures Of Two Witnesses and Their Addresses
RULES AND REGULATIONS OF THE ASSOCIATION
Pet, Revenue Ward No. 24, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh- 518301
Pet, Revenue Ward No. 24, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh- 518301
The area of operation of this
shall be all the revenue districts in the regions of

All the persons who are Indian Nationals and above the Age of 18 Years and are of sound Mind and are eligible to the Members of the Society. Their Membership shall be approved By the Executive Committee on acceptance of
admission Fee and a Monthly Subscription of
/- each. All subscriptions shall be paid every year i.e., before closing the financial year.
if any member fails to pay the subscriptions for 3 continuous months his name will be deleted from the list of members of the society
members shall be loyal and faith full to the society.
ociety shall be opened to all and shall not be restricted to
The Society shall maintain an up-to-date Membership register, records and addresses of all the members with the date of admission and date of termination if any.
Any member shall cease to be a member
On the acceptance of his resignation approved by Governing body.
On his/her becoming unsound, mad and suffering from Chronic diseases as per Medical Reports
On termination of his/her membership by the Society as provided in the Rules and Regulations or on conviction of any Court of Law and shall expel any member with the approval of 3/5
of the majority of the Executive Body on the proof of the violation of the Rules and Regulations of the Society.

No person shall be entitled to vote or be counted as a member whose subscription at the relevant time has been in arrears for a period exceeding three months. In such cases he or she will automatically cease to be a member and will lose his/her right to be as
If any member acts against the wishes of the Society or fraudulently indulges or violates the aims and objects of the Society his membership shall be terminated
Resignation by any member shall be through a notice served to the President at
the same shall be placed in the next Managing Committee meeting and acceptance of the same shall be intimated within

The General Body shall consist of the founders and Co-Op., members only. They must meet at least once in a year, in the month of January. A Quorum of the General Body shall be 3/5th of the membership. The adjourned meeting of the General Body need not have Quorum
The annual general body meeting shall be convened for the following purposes :
The General Body shall review and approve the annual statement of receipts and expenditure and the audited Balance Sheet of the previous completed year.

It shall appoint an auditor or auditors for next year to hold office till the conclusion of the next Annual General Body meeting to be fixed by the Board of Trustees from time to time. The retiring auditor is eligible for re-appointment.
To set up guidelines for the achievement of the objectives of the Trust.
The complete Management and control of the Society
rest on the Management Committee of the Society. The Managing Committee of the Society shall consist of a President

treasurer , and 5 members total in 10 members . The members of the managing committee shall be elected at a General Body meeting. The members of the managing committee shall hold the office for a period of 5 years at a time and that period shall and always with the conclusion of an Annual General Body Meeting. The executive committee shall be the authority for the Society for all its functions. The executive body shall consist of not less than and not more than 9 members. The managing committee shall meet at least 4 times in a year by a notice specifying the venue, Agenda, Time of meeting, the
notice shall be given to all members at least 10 days in advance.
It shall have powers to employ persons.
It is responsible for the smooth running and management of funds for advancement of the Society.
It shall receive Donations either in cash or in kind ,Grants, Contributions , raise loans ,etc.
It shall do such other things as to promote the cause of development of people.
It shall make rules and regulations as it thinks fit for the efficient management of the affairs of the Society.
It shall give notice to all General Body members 15 days in advance specifying the Venue, Agenda, and time of meeting of the General Body Meeting .
It shall exercise direct control over the following :
Personal working in Society administration and discipline.
The Executive body may appoint from among themselves or from outsiders other officers for the efficient better management of the organization and fix their remuneration.
The Managing Committee can reserve for itself the right to admit or not to admit a person who applies for membership
The Executive Committee shall meet ordinarily once in a year and meet often for any special purpose which may be fixed, by the Secretary in consultation with the president Society.
The meeting shall be presided over by the president or in the absence of the president, by the
or in the absence of the President and
by a member elected from among the member
Any member of the Executive Committee who absent himself without Permission
f the committee for any three Executive meetings shall cease to be member thereof. But he may for sufficient cause, be restored as a member by the Executive Committee.
Any vacancy caused in the Executive Committee by the resignation or otherwise shall be filled up by co-
ption by the other members of the Executive Committee.
The quorum for the meeting of the Executive Committee shall by 3/5
All the matters and resolutions of the Executive Committee shall be decided and carried by a majority vote.
In case of vitas bear equal on both sides, the president of the meeting shall exercise his casting vote
Vacancies either permanent or casual caused in the Society can be filled by the governing body by Co-option for the unexpired portion of the term of the office

The managing committee shall present the budget of Income and Expenditure of the Society prepared by the secretary on the aims and objects of the Society once in a year and get it approved and adopted

The President shall be the overall in charge of the Society and shall preside overall meetings of the Society. He can also advice the Secretary to call for emergency meetings of the managing committee at least by giving 3 days prior notice.
In the absence of the President or on the authorization of President the
The secretary can convene the meetings of the executive committee as well as meetings of general body
shall maintain all the records of the Society and issue notices for all the meetings in the end with consultation of the President

The secretary shall also be the member of the governing body of the Society. He shall present the accounts and reports to the executive body periodically and shall cause maintenance of accounts and records in close association with the treasurer. He shall be responsible for the selection of staff of the Society and shall be responsible for any disciplinary action if necessary.
shall prepare the plans and programs basing on the objectives of Society
shall be responsible for overall day to day administration for the smooth running of the Society
shall function as the main executive of the Society
The Secretary shall be entitled to borrow loans or take advances or accept either in kind or cash on behalf of the Society for the purpose of aims and objects of the Society

The Secretary of the Society shall be entitled to raise loans and advances from any commercial banks or financial institutions on behalf of the Society and such funds should be exclusively used for the purpose of achieving the main objects and aims of the Society. He
shall present the annual report of the Society to general body .He
shall be responsible for all kinds of activities that are sponsored by the Society.
The treasurer shall be responsible for the maintaining all the accounts for the finances received from the governing body
He or She shall attend to the Annual Audit and preparation of financial reports in close association with the secretary
He or She shall be responsible for maintenance of all accounts books and shall represent the same to all proper authorities
Funds for the execution of aims and objects of Society shall be collected by way of:
Donations either in cash or in kind
Gifts either in cash or in kind
Any other funds raised or received from the well-wishers and such other institutions registered under sec 12 AA of the Income tax Act.
Any amounts in the form loans and advances from the financial institutions, Nationalized Banks or such other institutions or from the individuals or concerns.

The funds of the Society so collected or raised shall be spent only for the purpose of attaining the main objects and aims of the Society and no portion thereof shall be paid or transferred either directly or indirectly to any of its members by any means.

The Society will endeavor to raise more funds needed for the attainment of main objects by other enterprises which may generate more resources to the Society, which can yield a surplus income to be used for the public charitable purposes of the Society.
All the funds negotiable instruments, bank accounts and operations shall be jointly by the President and treasurer.

Each member shall have one vote, and the co-opted members do not have any voting power. However, they can participate in discussions on invitation. In case of a tie, the President shall have a casting vote.
No amendments or alterations shall be made for the purpose as mentioned in the Memorandum of Association unless it is voted by 3/5
of the members present at a meeting of the general body convened for the purpose and confirmed by 3/5

of the members present at a second special meeting after an interval of one month. Any amendments to the Byelaws of the Society will be carried out only with the prior approval of the Commissioner/ Director of Income Tax [ Exemptions ] , Hyderabad.

In the event of dissolution of the Society all the remaining funds and assets after the full satisfaction of the liabilities of the Society shall be given to the Society having similar aims and objects and having Registration under Sec 12 AA of the Income Tax Act 1961
The surplus money of Society shall be invested only in securities referred to in Sec 11 ( 5 ) of Income Tax Act 1961

All documents relating to the immovable properties that may be endowed to the society through purchase, gift or lease shall be executed in favour of the society represented by its president for the time being.
All the society properties are vested in the name of the society who shall hold the same for the use and benefit of the Society.

The Governing Body does not have any power to alienate or to transfer or to mortgage or to pledge any of the properties standing in the name of the Society that are acquired and in peaceful possession of the Society as held today. The properties that are conveyed in the name of the Society either by way of acquisition or by gift or in kind or in any other mode shall not be transferred during the tenure of the Society either by the Governing Body or their members or by the Board of Members or by any others who hold interest in the Society.

Further the General Body may accept any immovable / movable properties by way of Gift or in Kind and if such properties are located and if in the opinion of the Board such properties are not manageable because of their location, may and if deem such of those properties may be disposed of by obtaining the approval of majority of the trustees on the board and also duly notifying the Act of Sale in local vernacular language or in a daily English newspaper.
The conveyance deed or deeds relating to alienation of disposal of the Society property shall be executed by the President of the Society for the time being for and on behalf of the Society.

Any member who has been appointed to the General Body shall cease his membership by any of the reasons stated below or any eventual situations that makes him incapable to continue as the Board member or to act as the Council.
If he or she becomes bankrupt.
If he or she is found to be lunatic or of an unsound mind.
If he or she resign his office.

If he acts in contravention of the objects of the Society or in a manner determined to the interest of the Society or guilty of misconduct in the opinion of the Society called for the purpose by the three-fourth of the members present.

If any member in the board of the society fails to attend 3 consecutive meetings irrespective of any factual circumstances, he shall be disqualified to continue or to act as the member of the General Body.
The society shall follow financial year for preparation of annual accounts (
March). The trust shall prepare receipts and payments, Income-Expenditure and Balance Sheet on the financial year ending on 31
The Society shall follow financial year for the preparation of financial statements.
The Society shall prepare Receipts and Payments, Income & Expenditure account, Balance Sheet every year.
The accounts of the society shall be audited by a Qualified Auditor/Chartered Accountant every year to be appointed by the Society at every annual general meeting.
There shall be no voting by proxy.
The Society shall not undertake any activity outside India.
The Society formed by us is a public charitable one and it is an irrevocable society
: The society shall sue or be sued in the name of the president
Any Judgment for the recovery of the property shall be enforced against the property of the society only.
ll other provisions of the ap society registration act
of 2001 not specially mentioned therein shall apply to this society.
We, the several members whose signature and designation and subscribed below desire to bring formed into the above-named society within the meaning and section
of 2001 of societies registration and we are also desirous to get registered the above society
Solemnly affirm and sincerely state as follows:
and I know the facts and swear this affidavit on behalf of me and on behalf of other executive members.
The below persons are the members of the society and formed as a society namely
Pet, Revenue Ward No. 24, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh- 518301
List of Executive Members along with their Address:
H.no. 24/407, Karvanpeta, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh -518301.
H.no. 24/407, Karvanpeta, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh -518301.
H.no. 24/407, Karvanpeta, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh -518301
H.no. 24/407, Karvanpeta, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh -518301
I am the owner of the premises situated at
H.no. 24/407, Karvanpeta, Adoni, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh -518301
I have no objection to Mrs. Raichur
establishing and operating a society under the name and style of

of the said society, and in view of our family relationship, I have permitted the society to use my premises free of cost for its office purposes. No rent or any other consideration has been collected or will be collected for the same.
This No Objection Letter is issued willingly for official and registration purposes.
